entry.title: 4 Cognitive Stages (Piaget)
entry.summary:
4 Cognitive Stages (Piaget)

Theory

  • sensorimotor
  • preoperational
  • concrete operational
    • age 7-12 yrs.
    • new skills
      • classification: age 8
      • seriation: age 8
      • conservation
    • logic and reasoning for direct experiences
  • on conservation
    • note about preoperatoinal conservation vs. concrete
    • now they understand
      • identity
      • reversibility
      • logical operation of
        • reciprocity or compensation
      • decentration
gantt
dateFormat X …
entry.content:
4 Cognitive Stages (Piaget)

Theory

  • sensorimotor
  • preoperational
  • concrete operational
    • age 7-12 yrs.
    • new skills
      • classification: age 8
      • seriation: age 8
      • conservation
    • logic and reasoning for direct experiences
  • on conservation
    • note about preoperatoinal conservation vs. concrete
    • now they understand
      • identity
      • reversibility
      • logical operation of
        • reciprocity or compensation
      • decentration
gantt
dateFormat X
axisFormat %s
sensorimotor: 0, 3
preoperational: 3, 6
concrete operational: 6, 11
formal operational: f, 11, 12
